calendar.matters:
Petition For Reformation Of Trust Or, In The Alternative, For Modification Of Trust On Consent Of All Beneficiaries
Off Calendar May-07-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Koplowitz, via ZOOM, counsel for Stephen Cohen, Petitioner.

At the outset, the court queries counsel regarding whether the Disclaimer Trust was funded with any assets, counsel reports that it was. Counsel also reports that it appears that all Beneficiaries have no issues with the court granting the petition for Reformation of the Trust, making the request for Modification of the Trust, moot. Accordingly, counsel advises that he will be submitting an updated [proposed] order to the court without the language regarding the Modification of Trust on Consent of all Beneficiaries.

The Petition for Reformation, etc., is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Reformation Of Trust Or, In The Alternative, For Modification Of Trust On Consent Of All Beneficiaries
